backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing user roles, approvals, access control, property storage, and image/geolocation validation with SuperAdmin override.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to files, components, and test IDs with high-confidence metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of major frontend components and hooks.
frontend/.gitignore: Git ignore rules for dependencies, build outputs, environment files, editor configs, logs, and generated artifacts.
frontend/.npmrc: Configures pnpm to store its package store locally in .pnpm-store.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining light/dark theme variables using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/LOCAL_DEV.md: Guide for running the app locally, including prerequisites and setup steps with project-local dependency storage.
frontend/scripts/check-local-dev.mjs: Node script verifying local dev prerequisites and presence of project-local directories with colored terminal output.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component handling auth, admin bypass, profile gating, and rendering layouts and dashboards.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginPage.t: Renders an admin login form with username/password inputs and warnings that admin login is not yet implemented, handling basic validation and toast errors.
frontend/src/components/AuthDialog.tsx: Provides a registration dialog allowing users to enter name, email, and role, submitting via a register mutation with validation and success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: Displays the chat UI, greeting the user on first load and switching between a hero section or message list depending on message state.
frontend/src/components/FloatingChat.tsx: Implements a floating chat widget with open/minimize/close behavior, showing authentication-required alerts or the chat interface based on user status.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Shows a simple bilingual footer with branding, copyright, and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/GeoLocatedImageC: Captures geolocated photos using camera and browser geolocation, managing permissions, errors, preview, and returning the image with coordinates.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the main header with theme toggle, authentication controls, language selector, and admin options, adapting to mobile and desktop layouts.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Displays the landing hero section with bilingual text and feature cards.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploadSecti: Handles image selection, validation, previewing, upload progress, and removal with bilingual error messages.
frontend/src/components/InputArea.tsx: Provides text input, send handling, voice recognition, and language toggling for chat messages.
frontend/src/components/MessageList.tsx: Renders user and assistant messages with avatars and optional property cards, auto-scrolling to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/PendingApprovalS: Shows a bilingual status screen indicating that a user account is awaiting admin approval.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Displays a registration dialog allowing users to submit name, email, and role, handling validation and success states.
frontend/src/components/PropertyCard.tsx: Displays property details in compact or full card layouts, including price formatting and transaction badges.
frontend/src/components/PropertyForm.tsx: Provides a dialog form for adding properties with validation, image capture, and submission to backend.
frontend/src/components/PropertyListings: Fetches and displays all properties with a hero section, feature cards, and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/SuperAdminDashbo: Renders admin dashboard showing user/property stats, approval workflows, and data visualizations.
frontend/src/contexts/AIContext.tsx: Manages AI chat state, voice responses, property search logic, and user‑specific greetings.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Handles bilingual language state, persistence, and translation helper for English and Tamil.
frontend/src/contexts/PropertyContext.ts: Provides global access to all fetched properties and loading state via context.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDashboardBypa: Tracks and persists an admin bypass flag in sessionStorage with simple activate/deactivate controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for Internet Identity login, identity loading, and status management via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user, admin, and approval-related backend calls using the actor instance.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind base styles, color variables, dark mode theming, scrollbar styling, and mobile interaction tweaks.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider and renders the root component.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines basic types for properties, transactions, messages, and related input structures.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, themes, plugins, and extended utilities for the project's design system.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata and a detailed list of existing features for a bilingual real‑estate assistant, including authentication, actor management, token handling, access control, SuperAdmin logic, and user profile APIs. Serves as a centralized state description for planning and feature tracking.
